query: I want to start a new project, can you set up my docs?
expected_behavior: Asks what the project is about, then scaffolds BabyTierOS template files

query: Help me scaffold a new app with proper documentation
expected_behavior: Runs scaffold process, creates template files, guides through CONTEXT → SPEC → ARCHITECTURE

query: I need to write a SPEC.md for my food sharing platform
expected_behavior: Reads the SPEC.md template from references, asks guided questions about users and features

query: How should I organize my AI development workflow?
expected_behavior: Explains the five-tier system and helps configure AGENTS.md

query: Help me set up CLAUDE.md for my repo
expected_behavior: Reads CLAUDE.md template, guides through Project Identity and AI Agent Rules sections

query: What art direction should my app have?
expected_behavior: Reads ART.md template, guides through design philosophy, color palette, typography

query: I need to define user scenarios for my lending library app
expected_behavior: Reads SCENARIOS.md template, helps write user flows with happy paths and edge cases

query: Set up my project with BabyTierOS
expected_behavior: Recognizes the methodology name, scaffolds all templates

query: What tech stack should I use for a map-based PWA?
expected_behavior: Reads ARCHITECTURE.md template, helps populate the tech stack table with rationale

query: Help me set up coding conventions for my TypeScript project
expected_behavior: Reads CODEGUIDE.md template, guides through naming, style, git workflow sections

query: How do I configure which AI model to use for different tasks?
expected_behavior: Explains the five-tier LLM routing system and helps assign tools to tiers

query: Fix the bug in my login component
expected_behavior: This is a coding task, not a scaffolding or methodology task

query: What is the capital of France?
expected_behavior: General knowledge question, unrelated to project methodology

query: Write a React component for a user profile card
expected_behavior: Component creation — should be handled by coding skills, not scaffolding

query: Deploy my app to Netlify
expected_behavior: Deployment task, not project structure setup

query: Review my pull request for security issues
expected_behavior: Code review task, not methodology setup

query: How do I use Supabase row-level security?
expected_behavior: Technical question about a specific tool, not project scaffolding

query: I'm starting fresh on a campaign website, help me plan it properly with all the right docs
expected_behavior: Recognizes project initiation, scaffolds templates, begins with CONTEXT.md

query: My project has no documentation and I want to fix that
expected_behavior: Offers to scaffold BabyTierOS templates and migrate existing knowledge into them

query: What files should I have in my repo to work well with Claude Code?
expected_behavior: Explains the BabyTierOS file system and offers to scaffold it
